title: fees.rs AmountOverflow for running note sum misuses variant fields; misleading error message
description: fees.rs:146-149: When the running note sum overflows u64 inside select_notes(), the code returns CoinSelectError::AmountOverflow { target: sum, fee: note.value_zatoshi }. The AmountOverflow variant's Display says 'target {target} + fee {fee} overflows u64' — but here 'target' is actually the running selection sum and 'fee' is a note's value, not the transaction fee. A user reading this error would think their target amount plus fee overflowed, which is not what happened. Either add a separate variant (e.g. NoteValueOverflow) or use the existing variant correctly by only triggering it for target+fee overflow. The in-note-sum overflow path should either be unreachable (real ZEC supply can't overflow u64) or produce a distinct, accurate error.
